nodes.title: Production change logging
nodes.raw_text: Every change made to a production system must be logged, recording who made the change and when it was made.
nodes.canonical_intent: requires: logging who made a production change and when; in order to: provide an audit trail for changes to live systems.

nodes.title: Leaver access removal process
nodes.raw_text: A documented joiners/movers/leavers process must ensure a leaver's system access is removed no later than their last working day.
nodes.canonical_intent: requires: a documented process that removes a leaver's access by their last working day; in order to: prevent former staff retaining access after they leave.

nodes.title: Incident response plan
nodes.raw_text: An incident response plan must be maintained and must be tested at least once a year.
nodes.canonical_intent: requires: a maintained, annually tested incident response plan; in order to: ensure the organisation can respond effectively to an operational incident.

nodes.title: Backup restorability testing
nodes.raw_text: Backups of production data must have their restorability tested at least quarterly.
nodes.canonical_intent: requires: quarterly testing that production backups can actually be restored; in order to: ensure data can really be recovered when it is needed, not just that a backup file exists.

nodes.title: Independent change approval
nodes.raw_text: A change to a production system must be approved by someone other than the person who implemented it.
nodes.canonical_intent: requires: production changes to be approved by someone other than the implementer; in order to: reduce the risk of an unauthorised or mistaken change reaching production.

nodes.title: Capacity and performance monitoring
nodes.raw_text: The capacity and performance of production systems must be monitored, with alerts configured against defined thresholds.
nodes.canonical_intent: requires: monitoring production capacity and performance against defined thresholds with alerting; in order to: detect capacity problems before they cause an outage.
